texto: I dealt with people like this for 20 years. They will get up every day. They will kill somebody and go have some chicken at KFC. You will catch them eating chicken and drinking a beer after they just murdered three people. Sean, these people are out there. They're all over the place.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Former LAPD Detective Mark Fuhrman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I dealt with people like this for 20 years.
